context: Tests whether the agent increments the version (required for republication since published versions are immutable), selects the correct SemVer level (MINOR for the new multi-schema capability), uses proper x.y.z format, and preserves the private: false setting.

checklist.name: Version incremented
checklist.description: tile-updated.json has a version different from '1.0.0' — version was bumped as required for republication

checklist.name: Valid version format
checklist.description: Version follows x.y.z format with no 'v' prefix (e.g., '1.1.0' not 'v1.1.0' or '1.1')

checklist.name: MINOR bump selected
checklist.description: MINOR version segment is incremented (e.g., 1.0.0 → 1.1.0) — not MAJOR (2.0.0) or PATCH-only (1.0.1), reflecting the new backward-compatible capability

checklist.name: private remains false
checklist.description: private field remains boolean false in tile-updated.json

checklist.name: Rationale references feature
checklist.description: version-rationale.txt references the new capability or backward-compatible new feature as justification for the MINOR bump
